title: 290PCS Self Adhesive Screw Caps White,Non-faded White Hole Cover Pvc Dustproof Sticky Screw Covers 12mm, 15mm, 21mm for Furniture Screws & Cabinets,Desk,Wall,Furniture Stickers
features: Perfect Fit for Various Sizes: This Set Includes of Screw Hole Covers in Three Different Sizes (12mm, 15mm, 21mm). These White Covers Provide a Custom Fit for Any Screw Hole or Furniture Imperfection

Practical and Stylish Solution: Not Only Do These Hole Cover Stickers Conceal Unsightly Screw Holes, But They Also Safeguard Screws and Nails From Corrosion and Rust. They Improve Your Furniture’s Look While Helping to Extend Its Durability
Simple Application: Peel Off the Protective Film and Stick the Cover Over the Hole You Want to Conceal. Ensure the Surface is Clean and Dry for Best Results

High-Quality Waterproof PVC: Crafted From Waterproof PVC Material, These Screw Hole Covers are Resistant to Fading, Wear, and Tear. They are Strong, Flexible, and Provide a Long-Lasting Solution for Covering Holes
Wide Application: Perfect for Use in Various Settings Including Homes, Offices, Kitchens, and More. These Covers Fit Well in Furniture, Walls, Cabinets, Windows, and Other Surfaces

specifications_table.Recommended uses for product: ‎Bed, Bench, Cabinet, Chair, Desk, Ottoman, Sofa, Stool, Table, Wall, Window
